network_interpretation: Current reset-era public LEZ testnet refresh plus historical pre-reset execute evidence. Fresh v0.2.0 deploy is included on current testnet; current execute attempts locally validate but are not included by the public endpoint, so current live execute remains blocked and must not be overclaimed.

reproducible_build.note: In LEZ a program is content-addressed, so ProgramId == ImageID. The wrapper and inner ids below are reproduced by this Docker-pinned build; `RISC0_USE_DOCKER=1 cargo run --bin lp0002-image-ids` prints the same ids from the host embed.

execute_tx.note: Current reset-era public testnet execute attempts return hashes but are not included; historical pre-reset execute evidence is retained separately.

inclusion_semantics: On LEZ a transaction is included in a block if and only if its program execution succeeds (sequencer/core: validate_on_state Ok => include, ProgramExecutionFailed => skip). The confirmed execute tx therefore records a successful on-chain run of the wrapper.
receipt_transport: receipt-journal-commitment-in-wrapper-input; full receipt retained in artifact evidence because raw receipt bytes exceed the current LEZ/RISC0 public-program session limit
evidence_commands: cargo risczero build --manifest-path methods/guest/Cargo.toml   # -> ImageID 974939ed... (wrapper) + 6fc85ce0... (threshold proof)
RISC0_USE_DOCKER=1 RISC0_DEV_MODE=0 cargo run --release --bin lp0002-prove-fixture target/lp0002-risc0-fixture-repro
evaluator_reverify: curl -s -X POST https://testnet.lez.logos.co/ -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"getTransaction","params":["352eb699507aea4d4ca6963a50bef1473a2b944dfd7713116cbf82eabfeec3bf"]}'  # expected null until blocker resolved

proposal_tx.note: LP-0002 proposals are represented in the RISC0 public journal and LEZ-shaped wrapper input; the confirmed public-testnet execute transaction above executes that bound proposal context.

approval_txs.privacy_note: Approver identities and membership witnesses remain private; public evidence exposes nullifier count and threshold only.

current_testnet_status_2026_06_27: recorded deploy/execute tx hashes return null on current public testnet; retained as historical proof only until redeploy/re-execute refreshes evidence

current_testnet_refresh_2026_06_28.client: LEZ v0.2.0 wallet/build-worktree helper on m4pro

local_v020_validation.summary: v0.2.0 Program::execute and ValidatedStateDiff::from_public_transaction both passed locally for the same program/input shape.

current_testnet_refresh_2026_06_28.honesty_boundary: Fresh deploy is current-live. Execute attempts returned hashes but re-query as Transaction is None; do not claim current live execute inclusion until public testnet includes an execute tx.

current_testnet_status_2026_06_28: fresh deploy tx c7157a473cb512bf7e1803d4377d9f65e9406a7ff98efeda48b65c0d4915a13b is present on current public testnet; execute attempts 352eb699507aea4d4ca6963a50bef1473a2b944dfd7713116cbf82eabfeec3bf and fc4165ac2437bd6533444c5e010b2d248aed678daadfad277af1dd0f1fef6ca8 return null/not included. Local v0.2.0 Program::execute and ValidatedStateDiff validation passed, indicating remaining blocker is public-testnet custom public execution inclusion, not local program validation.
